signals.headline: Sarah Huckabee Sanders and Vice Presidency:** In January 2024, Sanders confirmed she would **not** be Donald Trump's vic
signals.raw: Sarah Huckabee Sanders and Vice Presidency:** In January 2024, Sanders confirmed she would **not** be Donald Trump's vice presidential pick, stating she planned to remain as Arkansas governor and run for reelection[5]. Trump ultimately selected JD Vance as his running mate on July 15, 2024[1], and the Trump-Vance ticket won the 2024 presidential election[1].
matched_markets: Will Sarah Huckabee Sanders be the 2028 Republican Vice-Presidential nominee?
